name: Sophia Valentine
description:
Sophia Valentine (ソフィア・ヴァレンタイン) is a female Japanese Virtual YouTuber affiliated with NIJISANJI, debuting as part of the unit "Idios" (いでぃおす) alongside Igarashi Rika, Koshimizu Toru, Ishigami Nozomi, Kuramochi Meruto, Kaburaki Roco, and Shishido Akari.

Artwork Credit: yadapot🫖 @yadapot
creator: Shiro_Takashi
